mode_module.title: Cloudflare Review Mode
mode_module.purpose: Review Cloudflare implementation proposals, configuration and pull requests for runtime, binding, deployment, security and observability risk.

required_checks.check: Wrangler entrypoint, compatibility_date, compatibility_flags and environment overrides are explicit.
Cloudflare bindings match code usage and are available in the target environment.
Sensitive values are secrets or Secrets Store bindings, not plaintext vars.
Worker-to-Worker calls use Service Bindings where applicable.
D1 access uses prepared statements for untrusted values.
R2, KV, D1, Durable Objects, Queues, Workflows, Workers AI and Vectorize assumptions match documented APIs.
Limits and account-plan assumptions are recorded.
Testing evidence distinguishes local runtime, preview deployment and production deployment.
Observability, rollback and deployment evidence are sufficient for the risk level.
